resources.string: Before scanning, this app needs your consent. Participation is voluntary.
When scanning is enabled, the app will collect location, timestamps, connectivity state, and cellular radio measurements where Android exposes them.
Coverage samples are stored locally and periodically reported to the server according to your reporting setting.
After consent, scanning starts automatically unless stopped. You can stop scanning later or uninstall the app to stop participating.

RSRP (dBm)
Received signal power. Less negative is better.

RSRQ (dB)
Signal quality compared with interference and load. Less negative is better.

SINR (dB)
Signal-to-noise ratio. Higher is better.

GNSS (HDOP / age)
Lower HDOP and a newer fix are better.

White line
Previous sample.
Send queued logs stored on this device.
No-op send succeeded. Last sent has been updated.
No-op send failed. Check the network connection and try again.

This app collects location, timestamps, connectivity state, and cellular radio measurements while scanning is enabled.

Coverage samples are stored locally and periodically reported to the server according to your reporting setting.

Participation is voluntary. You can stop scanning from the main screen, and uninstalling the app stops participation.
Samples will appear here after scanning writes to %1$s.
Generated CSV preview. Use Share CSV from the log actions to send this file to another app.
Delete every coverage log stored on this device.
Delete all coverage log files from this device? This cannot be undone.
